name: Will-o'-Wisp
languages: the languages it knew in life

traits.name: Invisibility
traits.text: The will-o'-wisp and its light magically become invisible until it attacks or uses its Consume Life, or until its concentration ends (as if concentration on a spell).

traits.name: Consume Life
traits.text: As a bonus action, the will-o'-wisp can target one creature it can see within 5 feet of it that has 0 hit points and is still alive. The target must succeed on a 10 Constitution saving throw against this magic or die. If the target dies, the will-o'-wisp regains 10 (3d6) hit points.

traits.name: Ephemeral
traits.text: The will-o'-wisp can't wear or carry anything.

traits.name: Variable Illumination
traits.text: The will-o'-wisp sheds bright light in a 5 to 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional number of ft. equal to the chosen radius. The will-o'-wisp can alter the radius as a bonus action.
